microsoft_ft: **Deployed** Azure's resilience validation platform from a 2-person operation into a scalable, self-service system — standardizing integration workflows across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) and driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled teams to run integrations without engineering hand-holding.

Served as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility with zero missed SLA commitments.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning that cut planning cycle time by 39% and expanded drill capacity by 21% — translating real-world operational pain into an automation that shipped directly into production workflows.
microsoft_2023: Drove **customer adoption** of AI-driven code generation tooling by running live demos and hands-on training across 14 Azure service teams, translating workflow pain points into repeatable onboarding processes that saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.
Conducted **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a core capability.

Improved **deployment reliability** for AI-powered tooling by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to a semantic search system, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing integration friction for new adopters.

Ran discovery interviews with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a roadmap to **automate critical deployment paths** — directly reducing toil for every subsequent rollout.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact process improvements.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and delivering the transition with zero operational downtime — a live-environment deployment under real production constraints.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and setting a repeatable standard for future rollouts.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and **owned backlog prioritization**, resolving 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process to unblock the broader engineering team.
pro_painters: **Increased job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a new CRM process that became the operational standard for the sales team.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile based on real customer behavior data.
Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model improvements that directly improved unit economics for leadership.
